Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Thanks for joining me today, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}And, sorry for making you worry about all that stuff.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}We haven't really talked properly since what happened to Aragaki-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I keep thinking about the last thing he said to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I have to live for myself... But, how exactly do I do that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I wasn't sure where to start, but I've been trying all kinds of things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}Things that the old me would've never considered.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Like hanging out with my friends at school, reading manga, and even watching TV.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'm also trying to make an effort to talk to people in the dorm more.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Mitsuru-san helped me with my homework the other day, and I even beat Junpei-san in a video game![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh, I also ate snacks with Yukari-san and the others, and Aigis-san helped me feed Hamburger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I realized that little things like this can really make life enjoyable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Well, that's what I've learned so far.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Right. I might try some more things later on too, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}For now at least, I think I have an idea of how to live my life again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I will. I've done enough thinking. Now I just want to try doing all kinds of new things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}I think I have an idea of how to live my life again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Of course! Let's go get ramen together again one of these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It was so delicious the last time we had it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}You know, I've noticed other people in the dorm talk about you a lot, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Everyone seems to be really happy when they do, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}The hard battles continue, but we're still able to keep going...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}...And it's because we all know when we come back, you'll always be there for us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_012_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That'd be nice if it were true.

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}You think so...? Well, that's how I feel at least.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}You're always leading the way and giving everyone courage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'm sure it is. It's not just that you're the leader during our battles...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I feel like you're always looking after us and making sure we're okay, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Yeah. I can't explain it very well, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I feel like you can see the real me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I want to continue learning from your example. That's okay, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Anyways, sorry that all took so long. The night air is getting chilly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I listened to what Amada had been[n]up to as we went back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has[n]improved after witnessing Amada's[n]thoughtfulness towards Mitsuru...[n]{f 1 1}
